creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #5)
I don't have github account (as it is [indirectly] owned by Microsoft, thus I don't want to register). And I couldn't find (possibly overlooking, though) any email account of upstream maintainers nor mailing list. So I have no way to upstream this.

And I cannot judge whether this is FreeBSD-specific or upstream problem.
So if Adam don't think this is FreeBSD specific as the ports maintainer, let's close here and reopen in the future if this somehow turns out to be FreeBSD specific.
